task_completion.description: Log into NOSH ChartingSystem using admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login, ideally showing 'admin' as the logged-in user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Address Book or Contacts section to add a new entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Address Book, Contacts, or 'Add Contact' interface is open within the NOSH ChartingSystem.

task_completion.description: Enter the pharmacy name and specialty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name/Facility field contains 'Springfield Family Pharmacy' and the Specialty field contains 'Pharmacy'.
The Address field contains '1625 Main Street', City contains 'Springfield', State contains 'MA', and Zip contains '01103'.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone and fax numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Phone field contains '413-736-1025' and the Fax field contains '413-736-1026'.

task_completion.description: Save the new pharmacy entry to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the contact was saved, or the newly created 'Springfield Family Pharmacy' entry is visible in the saved address book list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual NOSH ChartingSystem application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page layout match the NOSH ChartingSystem, rather than a local text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the task description text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show data entry into form fields, not just a text file or terminal echoing the expected output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values are entered in the NOSH Address Book: Name/Facility: 'Springfield Family Pharmacy', Address: '1625 Main Street', City: 'Springfield', State: 'MA', Zip: '01103', Phone: '413-736-1025', Fax: '413-736-1026', Specialty: 'Pharmacy'.
